description_long: This kiosk features a compact, rectangular structure with a predominantly black and beige color scheme, accented by a turquoise panel and metallic elements. The exterior walls are smooth and slightly curved at the corners, giving it a modern, streamlined appearance. The interior is partially visible, revealing wooden slatted benches along the sides and a central counter or partition, possibly for service or display. A vertical metallic pipe or vent is present near the center, suggesting ventilation or a heating element. The front and rear both have large open archways, allowing easy access and visibility into the kiosk. The roof is flat and extends slightly beyond the walls, providing minimal overhang.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with black and beige panels, open archways at both ends, and wooden benches inside. Features a flat roof, turquoise accent panel, and a central metallic vent.
description_view_0: Front view shows a large open archway, black curved exterior, and a beige horizontal bar with a gold handle detail.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the interior layout with wooden benches, turquoise panel, central counter, and metallic vent.
description_view_2: Rear view displays another open archway, black and beige paneling, and a turquoise accent visible inside.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the central counter, metallic vent, and the arrangement of benches and panels.
attribute_door_configuration: two open archways, one at each end
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with slight overhang, smooth surface, no visible decorative elements
